cases.title: SEARCH/REPLACE patch applies cleanly 001
cases.prompt: Patch src/feature-001.ts so exportedValue is new-001. Use one SEARCH/REPLACE edit block.
cases.originalContent:
export const exportedValue = "old-001";
export const untouched = true;
cases.expectedContent:
export const exportedValue = "new-001";
export const untouched = true;
